name: ExtensionMeasureReport_ReportingVendor
title: R5: What vendor prepared the data (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MeasureReport.reportingVendor` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MeasureReport.reportingVendor` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MeasureReport.reportingVendor` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MeasureReport.reportingVendor` has a context of MeasureReport based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MeasureReport`.
Element `MeasureReport.reportingVendor` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: What vendor prepared the data (new)
element.comment:
Element `MeasureReport.reportingVendor` has a context of MeasureReport based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MeasureReport`.
Element `MeasureReport.reportingVendor` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: A reference to the vendor who queried the data, calculated results and/or generated the report. The ‘reporting vendor’ is intended to represent the submitting entity when it is not the same as the reporting entity. This extension is used when the Receiver is interested in getting vendor information in the report.
